## Checklist

- [ ] `pytest` passes locally
- [ ] If I changed the packet layout, I updated the offset tests in `tests/test_packet.py`
- [ ] No new external/runtime dependencies (or explained why one is needed)
- [ ] Docs updated if behaviour or config changed
